title: Best Thing
lyrics: Yeah, I can feel it, I can feel it from my head to my toes And what you don't know See it Feeling so nice in this wild dream Reality as it seems Hidden and we're walking through the flames Flames of our hearts desires Oh, and you're looking so good It shows in my form, my tone Yeah, I wanna get you alone Oh, you can waste my time anyways Just Let go, slow down The rush, what does it mean? Oh, I'm feeling it Oh, we're killing it The bond between us, oh Baby, it comes fast And all of a sudden, you love it, make it last But what if we do and make it past? The old you All this new in front of you What do you do? Oh, God I can't even explain the war I'm feeling It's like it's something that can't be real Oh, hidden in the world Fire lies Fire lies a better world Oh, you go slow Till you feel it all You just understand the world when we walk You understand the way in which objects get in and leave In time for fire, for it, and looking in As it goes away, time's direction For age, for loss, for confusion I don't even know where weapons come last Weapons come and the fight is more at last Like every other one Fighting for what's mine Fighting for what's yours It's just a way I guess we're raised, we can't control But we can If you just walk, here's my hand Oh, yeah, we can Motherfucker say, you can Motherfucker say, you can Like, is that like fuckin' R. Kelly, I can fly? No, I don't think you should talk about R. Kelly It's too soon, too soon, too soon We don't do pissing here We do not do fuckin' pissing here

lyricsSegments.text: Yeah, I can feel it, I can feel it from my head to my toes
Feeling so nice in this wild dream
Hidden and we're walking through the flames
Oh, and you're looking so good
It shows in my form, my tone
Yeah, I wanna get you alone
Oh, you can waste my time anyways
The rush, what does it mean?
And all of a sudden, you love it, make it last
But what if we do and make it past?
All this new in front of you
I can't even explain the war I'm feeling
It's like it's something that can't be real
You just understand the world when we walk
You understand the way in which objects get in and leave
In time for fire, for it, and looking in
As it goes away, time's direction
For age, for loss, for confusion
I don't even know where weapons come last
Weapons come and the fight is more at last
I guess we're raised, we can't control
If you just walk, here's my hand
Like, is that like fuckin' R. Kelly, I can fly?
No, I don't think you should talk about R. Kelly
It's too soon, too soon, too soon
We do not do fuckin' pissing here
